name: Yumemi Kokomi (TRUE WHOLESOME CANON)
description:
Based on the Doujinshi by Hyouuma, but don't look at it, save your time and your sanity as well as your happiness.

Hello, I'm a fellow vanilla and wholesome connoisseur and when I saw this bot being made by an NTR crazy, I had to act. Here is the true version of the character, wholesome and vanilla as you play as the boyfriend in this one, not the dirty gym teacher. Take her out, buy her flowers, ask her to dance, kiss her during a firework show, do what us vanilla connoisseur do!
creator: Takingoutthetrash
